name: OG Kush
desc: The classic. Heavy, lemon-pine smell, full-body relax. The grandfather of west coast strains.

name: Sour Diesel
desc: Fast-acting head buzz. Fuel-strong nose. The wake-and-bake legend.

name: Granddaddy Purple
desc: Purple buds, grape smell, couch-lock guaranteed. The night cap.

name: Blue Dream
desc: The crowd pleaser. Berry sweet, balanced high, works for everyone.

name: Girl Scout Cookies
desc: Sweet earthy nose. Heavy euphoria with full-body relax. GSC built California.

name: Northern Lights
desc: Pure indica royalty. Resinous, sweet pine. The nighttime classic.

name: Jack Herer
desc: Named for the legend. Pine-spicy, clear-headed, the working-day sativa.

name: White Widow
desc: Frosty white trichomes. Balanced punch. Amsterdam coffeeshop staple.

name: Pineapple Express
desc: Tropical fruit nose. Active, productive high. Yes, like the movie.

name: AK-47
desc: Long-lasting body buzz with a steady cerebral lift. Award shelf staple.

name: Durban Poison
desc: Pure South African sativa. Pure energy. Espresso of weed.

name: Bruce Banner
desc: Hulk-smash THC. Fast euphoric kick, mellow tail. Strong.

name: Green Crack
desc: Mango-tangy nose. Sharp focus, no crash. Daytime fuel.

name: Gelato
desc: Dessert in a bag. Sweet citrus-berry, heavy body, clear head. Cookies family.

name: Runtz
desc: Candy-fruity terps. Smooth euphoric ride. The hype kid.

name: Zkittlez
desc: Taste the rainbow. Skittles-sweet, mellow body, clear head.

name: Wedding Cake
desc: Vanilla-tangy, heavy-trichome, full body but not couch-lock. The pinnacle of dessert strains.

name: Gorilla Glue #4
desc: Will glue you to the couch. Heavy resin, heavy body. Sticky.

name: MAC 1
desc: Miracle Alien Cookies. Floral-citrus nose, balanced high, premium tier.

name: Purple Haze
desc: Hendrix knew. Dreamy euphoria, sweet berry nose. 70s in plant form.

name: Strawberry Cough
desc: Sweet strawberry on inhale, expansive cough. Social, talkative.

name: Trainwreck
desc: Hits like the name. Spicy pine, fast euphoric punch.

name: Chemdawg
desc: The diesel ancestor. Pungent gas, cerebral and physical, foundational genetics.

name: Super Lemon Haze
desc: Bright lemon zest. Fast head rush, productive.

name: Do-Si-Dos
desc: Heavy GSC cross. Funky floral nose, sledgehammer body.

name: Sunset Sherbet
desc: Creamy berry. GSC offspring. Mellow body, social head.

name: Banana Kush
desc: Ripe banana on inhale. Smooth body, social hybrid.

name: Cherry Pie
desc: Sweet cherry-skunk. Quick onset, full-body warmth. GSC parent.

name: Lemon Cherry Gelato
desc: Wonka-fruit nose. The viral strain of 2023. Balanced power.

name: Apple Fritter
desc: Cinnamon-apple terps. Heavy euphoria into full body.

name: Ice Cream Cake
desc: Vanilla creme. Knockout indica. Dessert before bed.

name: Biscotti
desc: Cookie crumble nose. Calm euphoric drift. GSC heritage.

name: Jealousy
desc: Sherbinski's tropical fuel. Modern award darling.

name: Oreoz
desc: Chocolate cookies + diesel. Heavy hitter, sleepy tail.

name: London Pound Cake
desc: Sweet berry-citrus. Smooth body, mellow euphoria.

name: Khalifa Kush
desc: Wiz's namesake. Sharp lemon-pine. Quick head, calm body.

name: Alien OG
desc: Tahoe OG x Alien Kush. Heavy spacey relax. Take-off ticket.

name: Kosher Kush
desc: Rabbi-blessed (legend). Dense buds, full sedation.

name: Forbidden Fruit
desc: Passionfruit-cherry. Heavy body, lazy euphoria.

name: Black Cherry Gelato
desc: Dark cherry funk. Heavy mellow indica leaning.

name: Ghost Train Haze
desc: Strong cerebral sativa. Tangy citrus. Hits the head fast.

name: Amnesia Haze
desc: Coffeeshop cup champion. Strong head rush, long ride.

name: Super Silver Haze
desc: Tall, frosty buds. Pure energy. The morning haze.

name: Lemon Haze
desc: Sharp lemon, energetic head buzz. The cup winner.

name: Tangie
desc: Pure tangerine terps. Light, social. The orange you'd actually wanna smoke.

name: Mochi
desc: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC. Doughy-sweet, smooth balance.

name: Watermelon Zkittlez
desc: Bubblegum-watermelon. Smooth indica float.

name: Slurricane
desc: Berry-tropical. Heavy body crusher. In Da Lab classic.

name: Mimosa
desc: Bright morning citrus. Productive happy lean.

name: Papaya
desc: Tropical fruit-bomb. Calm body, light euphoric drift.

name: Animal Cookies
desc: GSC x Fire OG. Heavy body, sweet earthy nose.

name: Thin Mint
desc: Cool mint terps over earthy GSC. Mellow euphoria.

name: Platinum GSC
desc: Frosty cousin of OG GSC. Slightly heavier body.

name: Hindu Kush
desc: Pure landrace indica. Stone-cold body, hashy aroma.

name: Afghan Kush
desc: Hindu Kush mountain ancestor. Hashy, heavy, classic.

name: Charlotte's Web
desc: High CBD, near-zero THC. Therapeutic without the high.

name: ACDC
desc: CBD-dominant. Clear-headed body calm, no head fog.

name: Harlequin
desc: CBD-leaning sativa. Functional, gentle, clear.

name: Sundae Driver
desc: Ice cream sundae nose. Balanced, social, mellow.

name: Cereal Milk
desc: Saturday morning bowl-of-cereal terps. Cookies family.

name: Gushers
desc: Fruit-snack burst. Smooth body, social head.
